query_string:
with prep_app_log as (
  select
    user_pseudo_id
    , regexp_extract(event_params, '{"key":"ga_session_id","value":{"string_value":null,"int_value":(\d+)', 1) as ga_session_id
    , event_unixtime
    , case event_name
        when 'nom_tpcard' then '指名選択画面からTPカードを開く'
        when 'top_history_tpcard' then '施術履歴のあるTPからTPカードを開く'
        when 'top_favorite_tpcard' then 'お気に入りTPからTPカードを開く'
        when 'open_tpcard_from_ranking_top_page' then '全国ランキングからTPカードを開く'
        when 'open_tpcard_from_ranking_shop_detail' then '店舗詳細のランキングからTPカードを開く'
        when 'tap_tp_card_calendar' then 'TPカード内カレンダーボタンをタップ'
        when 'complete_res_from_tp_card_calendar' then 'TPカード内カレンダーボタンから予約完了'
        when 'tap_tp_card_favorite_on' then 'TPカード内お気に入りON'
        when 'tap_tp_card_favorite_off' then 'TPカード内お気に入りOFF'
        else null
      end as event_name_tpcard
    , case event_name
        when 'nom_tpcard' then 1
        when 'top_history_tpcard' then 1
        when 'top_favorite_tpcard' then 1
        when 'open_tpcard_from_ranking_top_page' then 1
        when 'open_tpcard_from_ranking_shop_detail' then 1
        when 'tap_tp_card_calendar' then 1
        when 'complete_res_from_tp_card_calendar' then 1
        when 'tap_tp_card_favorite_on' then 1
        when 'tap_tp_card_favorite_off' then 1
        else 0
      end as tpcard_event_flag
    , try_cast(regexp_extract(event_params, '{"key":"reservation_id","value":{"string_value":"(\d+)"', 1) as bigint) as reservation_id
  from
    _l0_bigquery.firebase_event_log
  where
    time >= td_time_parse('2025-10-01', 'jst')
)

, reserve_session as (
  select
    reservation_id
    , user_pseudo_id
    , ga_session_id
    , min(event_unixtime) as reserve_event_unixtime
  from prep_app_log
  where reservation_id is not null
  group by 1,2,3
)

, session_tpcard as (
  select
    td_date_trunc('week', event_unixtime, 'jst') as business_week
    , user_pseudo_id
    , ga_session_id
    , max(if(tpcard_event_flag = 1, 1, 0)) as via_tpcard
  from prep_app_log
  group by 1,2,3
)

, prep_agg_session as (
  select
    business_week
    , count(distinct user_pseudo_id||ga_session_id) as session_count
    , count(distinct if(via_tpcard = 1, user_pseudo_id||ga_session_id)) as session_count_tpcard
    , count(distinct if(via_tpcard = 0, user_pseudo_id||ga_session_id)) as session_count_non_tpcard
  from
    session_tpcard
  group by
    1
)


, prep_reserve_log as (
  select
    id as reservation_id
    , if(status = 0, 1, 0) as cancel_flag
    , td_time_parse(created, 'jst') as reserve_registered_unixtime
    , max(if(reserved_from = 'APP', 1, 0)) as via_app_reserve
  from
    _l1_mysql_reservation.reservations
  where
    parent_reservation_id is null
  group by
    1,2,3
)

, prep_agg_1w_session as (
  select
    t0.reservation_id
    , if(coalesce(t1.user_pseudo_id, t1.ga_session_id) is not null, 1, 0) as app_session_flag
    , max(coalesce(t2.via_tpcard, 0)) as via_tpcard
  from prep_reserve_log as t0
  left join reserve_session as t1
    on t0.reservation_id = t1.reservation_id
  left join session_tpcard as t2
    on t1.user_pseudo_id = t2.user_pseudo_id
   and t1.ga_session_id  = t2.ga_session_id
  group by 
    1,2
)

, prep_merged as (
  select 
     t0.reservation_id
     , order_id
     , coalesce(cancel_flag, 0) as cancel_flag
     , coalesce(via_app_reserve , 0) as via_app_reserve
     , coalesce(via_tpcard , 0) as via_tpcard
     , not_reserve_flag
     , coalesce(app_session_flag, 0) as app_session_flag
     , business_date
     , td_date_trunc('week', t0.reserve_registered_unixtime, 'jst') as business_week
     , property_id
     , customer_id
     , therapist_id
     , therapist_no
     , nomination_fee
     -- , row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by business_date, order_id) as seq_by_customer
     , row_number() over (partition by customer_id, therapist_id order by business_date, order_id) as seq_by_customer_therapist
     , if(nomination_fee>=182.0, row_number() over (partition by customer_id, therapist_id, nomination_fee>=182.0 order by business_date, order_id), 0) as flag_1st_nomination
  from prep_reserve_log as t0
  full outer join (
      select
        order_id
        , business_date
        , property_id
        , customer_id
        , therapist_id
        , reservation_id
        , if(reservation_id is null and parent_order_id is null, 1, 0) as not_reserve_flag
        , max(nomination_fee) as nomination_fee
      from
        _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail
      group by
        1,2,3,4,5,6,7
    ) as t1 on t0.reservation_id = t1.reservation_id
  left join
    prep_agg_1w_session as t2
    on t0.reservation_id = t2.reservation_id
  left join
    (select therapist_id, therapist_no from _integration_datamart.mst_therapist) using (therapist_id)
)

, tmp as (
select
  td_date_trunc('week',coalesce(td_time_parse(business_date, 'jst'), business_week), 'jst') as business_week
  , count(distinct reservation_id) as reservation_count

  /* app */
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1, reservation_id)) as app_reservation_count
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1, order_id)) as app_order_count
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination >= 1, order_id)) as app_nomination_count
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1, order_id)) as app_first_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_first_order_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 2 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_second_order_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 3 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_third_or_more_order_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_first_nomination_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_first_order_first_nomination_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 2 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_second_order_first_nomination_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 3 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_third_or_more_order_first_nomination_non_tpcard

  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2, order_id)) as app_repeat_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_repeat_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_repeat_nomination_non_tpcard

  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0, order_id)) as app_free
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_free_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_free_first_order_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 2 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as app_free_second_or_more_order_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_free_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_free_first_order_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 2 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as app_free_second_or_more_order_non_tpcard

  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and cancel_flag = 1, reservation_id)) as app_cancel
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and cancel_flag = 1 and via_tpcard = 1, reservation_id)) as app_cancel_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 1 and cancel_flag = 1 and via_tpcard = 0, reservation_id)) as app_cancel_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_tpcard = 1, reservation_id)) as app_reserve_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_tpcard = 0, reservation_id)) as app_reserve_non_tpcard

  /* other */
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0, reservation_id)) as other_reservation_count
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0, order_id)) as other_order_count
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 1, order_id)) as other_nomination_count
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1, order_id)) as other_first_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as other_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as other_first_order_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 2 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as other_second_order_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 3 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as other_third_or_more_order_first_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as other_first_nomination_non_tpcard

  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2, order_id)) as other_repeat_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as other_repeat_nomination_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as other_repeat_nomination_non_tpcard

  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0, order_id)) as other_free
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and via_tpcard = 1, order_id)) as other_free_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as other_free_non_tpcard

  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag > 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and cancel_flag = 1, reservation_id)) as other_cancel

  /* no app view */
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0, reservation_id)) as no_app_view_reservation
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0, reservation_id)) as no_app_view_other_reservation
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 1, reservation_id)) as no_app_view_app_reservation
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0, order_id)) as no_app_view_other_order
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 1, order_id)) as no_app_view_other_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1, order_id)) as no_app_view_other_first_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1, order_id)) as no_app_view_other_first_order_first_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 2, order_id)) as no_app_view_other_second_order_first_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 1 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 3, order_id)) as no_app_view_other_third_or_more_order_first_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2, order_id)) as no_app_view_repeat_nomination
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination >= 2 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as no_app_view_repeat_nomination_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0, order_id)) as no_app_view_free
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as no_app_view_free_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and seq_by_customer_therapist = 1 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as no_app_view_free_first_order_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and flag_1st_nomination = 0 and seq_by_customer_therapist >= 2 and via_tpcard = 0, order_id)) as no_app_view_free_second_or_more_order_non_tpcard
  , count(distinct if(app_session_flag = 0 and via_app_reserve = 0 and cancel_flag = 1, reservation_id)) as no_app_view_other_cancel

  /* no reservation */
  , count(distinct if(not_reserve_flag = 1, order_id)) as no_reservation_order
from
  prep_merged
where
  coalesce(td_time_parse(business_date, 'jst'), business_week) >= td_time_add(td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst'), '-13w')
group by
  1
order by
  1
)


select
  td_time_string(t0.business_week, 'd!', 'jst') as "営業日の週"
  , reservation_count as "予約数"
  , session_count as "APPビュー数"
  /* app */
  , app_reservation_count as "APP経由_予約数"
  , app_order_count as "APP経由_施術数"
  , app_nomination_count as "APP経由_指名数"
  , app_first_nomination as "APP経由_初指名"
  , app_first_nomination_tpcard as "APP経由_初指名_TPカード経由"
  , app_first_order_first_nomination_tpcard as "APP経由_初施術-初指名_TPカード経由"
  , app_second_order_first_nomination_tpcard as "APP経由_2回目施術-初指名_TPカード経由"
  , app_third_or_more_order_first_nomination_tpcard as "APP経由_3回目施術-初指名_TPカード経由"
  , app_first_nomination_non_tpcard as "APP経由_初指名_TPカード非経由"
  , app_first_order_first_nomination_non_tpcard as "APP経由_初施術-初指名_TPカード非経由"
  , app_second_order_first_nomination_non_tpcard as "APP経由_2回目施術-初指名_TPカード非経由"
  , app_third_or_more_order_first_nomination_non_tpcard as "APP経由_3回目施術-初指名_TPカード非経由"

  , app_repeat_nomination as "APP経由_リピート指名"
  , app_repeat_nomination_tpcard as "APP経由_リピート指名_TPカード経由"
  , app_repeat_nomination_non_tpcard as "APP経由_リピート指名_TPカード非経由"

  , app_free as "APP経由_フリー"
  , app_free_tpcard as "APP経由_フリー_TPカード経由"
  , app_free_first_order_tpcard as "APP経由_フリー_初施術_TPカード経由"
  , app_free_second_or_more_order_tpcard as "APP経由_フリー_2回目以上_TPカード経由"
  , app_free_non_tpcard as "APP経由_フリー_TPカード非経由"
  , app_free_first_order_non_tpcard as "APP経由_フリー_初施術_TPカード非経由"
  , app_free_second_or_more_order_non_tpcard as "APP経由_フリー_2回目以上_TPカード非経由"

  , app_cancel as "APP経由_キャンセル"
  , app_cancel_tpcard as "APP経由_キャンセル_TPカード経由"
  , app_cancel_non_tpcard as "APP経由_キャンセル_TPカード非経由"

  , session_count - (app_reserve_tpcard + app_reserve_non_tpcard) as "APP経由_離脱数"
  , session_count_tpcard - app_reserve_tpcard as "APP経由_離脱数_TPカード経由"
  , session_count_non_tpcard - app_reserve_non_tpcard as "APP経由_離脱数_TPカード非経由"

  , other_reservation_count as "APPビューあり_その他経由_予約"
  , other_order_count as "APPビューあり_その他経由_施術数"
  , other_nomination_count as "APPビューあり_その他経由_指名数"
  , other_first_nomination as "APPビューあり_その他経由_初指名"
  , other_first_nomination_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_初指名_TPカード経由"
  , other_first_order_first_nomination_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_初施術-初指名_TPカード経由"
  , other_second_order_first_nomination_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_2回目施術-初指名_TPカード経由"
  , other_third_or_more_order_first_nomination_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_3回目施術-初指名_TPカード経由"
  , other_first_nomination_non_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_初指名_TPカード非経由"

  , other_repeat_nomination as "APPビューあり_その他経由_リピート指名"
  , other_repeat_nomination_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_リピート指名_TPカード経由"
  , other_repeat_nomination_non_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_リピート指名_TPカード非経由"

  , other_free as "APPビューあり_その他経由_フリー"
  , other_free_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_フリー_TPカード経由"
  , other_free_non_tpcard as "APPビューあり_その他経由_フリー_TPカード非経由"

  , other_cancel as "APPビューあり_その他経由_キャンセル"

  , no_app_view_reservation as "APPビューなし_予約数"
  , no_app_view_other_reservation as "APPビューなし_その他経由_予約"
  --, no_app_view_app_reservation as "APPビューなし_APP経由_施術数"
  , no_app_view_other_order as "APPビューなし_その他経由_施術数"
  , no_app_view_other_nomination as "APPビューなし_その他経由_指名数"
  , no_app_view_other_first_nomination as "APPビューなし_その他経由_初指名"
  , no_app_view_other_first_order_first_nomination as "APPビューなし_その他経由_初施術-初指名"
  , no_app_view_other_second_order_first_nomination as "APPビューなし_その他経由_2回目施術-初指名"
  , no_app_view_other_third_or_more_order_first_nomination as "APPビューなし_その他経由_3回目施術-初指名"
  , no_app_view_repeat_nomination as "APPビューなし_リピート指名"
  , no_app_view_repeat_nomination_non_tpcard as "APPビューなし_リピート指名_TPカード非経由"
  , no_app_view_free as "APPビューなし_フリー"
  , no_app_view_free_non_tpcard as "APPビューなし_フリー_TPカード非経由"
  , no_app_view_free_first_order_non_tpcard as "APPビューなし_フリー_初施術_TPカード非経由"
  , no_app_view_free_second_or_more_order_non_tpcard as "APPビューなし_フリー_2回目以上_TPカード非経由"
  , no_app_view_other_cancel as "APPビューなし_その他経由_キャンセル数"

  /* no reservation */
  , no_reservation_order as "予約なし施術数"
from
  tmp as t0
left join
  prep_agg_session as t1
  on t0.business_week = t1.business_week
order by
  1
